summary: Iteration 34 - Multi-step Provider Registration Testing. Backend: 9/9 tests PASS (100%). Frontend: All tests PASS. The 6-step provider registration form (/registrar-residencia) is fully functional with proper validation, step navigation, and successful submission leading to /registro-exitoso.

backend_api_tests: POST /api/auth/register-provider - Creates user with role 'provider' and provider with approved=False
POST /api/auth/register-provider - Duplicate email returns 400 error with 'ya está registrado' message
POST /api/auth/register-provider - Short password (<6 chars) returns 400 error
POST /api/auth/register-provider - Empty business name returns 400 error
GET /api/admin/providers/pending - Returns pending providers (requires admin auth)
GET /api/providers - Pending providers NOT in public search (approved=False filtered)
POST /api/admin/providers/{id}/approve - Admin can approve provider (requires admin auth)
POST /api/admin/providers/{id}/approve - Approved provider appears in public search
frontend_ui_tests: Step 1 has all required fields: business name, email, password, confirm password
Step 1 validation - empty fields prevent navigation
Step 1 validation - mismatched passwords prevent navigation
Step 1 validation - short password (<6 chars) shows error toast
Step navigation works - next/previous buttons functional
Step 6 shows confirmation summary with entered data
Success page has 'Ir a Iniciar Sesión' button and 'Volver al Inicio' button

critical_code_review_comments: All data-testid attributes properly implemented for testing
Form validation works correctly on frontend and backend
approved=False correctly filters providers from public search
seed_data_creation: Multiple test providers created with TEST_ prefix emails during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 34: Multi-step provider registration feature fully tested and working. Backend endpoint /api/auth/register-provider creates user with role 'provider' and provider with approved=False. Providers only appear in public search after admin approval via /api/admin/providers/{id}/approve. Frontend 6-step form at /registrar-residencia works with proper validation (business name required, email required, password min 6 chars, confirm password must match). Success page at /registro-exitoso displays correctly after submission.
